case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $8,000.00 U.S. ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT VIGNA, MEREDITH ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $8,000.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE FILED BY CLAIMANT VIGNA, MEREDITH
PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM (15-091) (TRANSACTION ID # 58025078) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
PROOF OF SERVICE OF CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE; SUPPORTING DOCUMENTS( LETTER FROM MEREDITH VIGNA, 2014 W-2, 2015 STATEMENT OF WAGES TO DATE) FILED BY DEFENDANT VIGNA, MEREDITH
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2,000.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT MEREDITH VIGNA. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $6,000.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
